response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy requiring 15 years of experience plus recognized AI expertise. Candidate has roughly 13-16 years of mostly hands-on senior IC experience, no demonstrated AI/ML platform leadership, no advanced AI degree, and no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product strategy at scale.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack and embedded engineering background
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Active community contributor with talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No recognized AI/ML expertise or shipped AI products at platform scale
Lacks director-level strategic leadership or advisory experience with cloud/AI customers
No demonstrated cloud architecture depth (AWS CDK mention only) expected for a Principal cloud/AI role

key_factors.factor: Missing AI strategy and platform leadership track record
Seniority mismatch — senior IC vs. director-level principal
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure
